description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named publish nuget that triggers on push events with any tag. The workflow should run on an ubuntu-latest environment, checking out the code and setting up .NET SDK 5.0.100. It should then dynamically update a version number in a specific C# file based on the GitHub tag reference, pack multiple .NET projects with a version derived from the tag, and push the resulting NuGet packages to NuGet.org using a provided API key.
